name: Keshun Waterproof Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Keshun Waterproof Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells waterproof coatings, bitumen membranes, adhesives, and other chemical products for building and infrastructure applications in China. The company offers synthetic polymer, self-adhesive bitumen, and torch-applied bitumen membranes; modified bitumen, polyurethane and polyuria, acrylic waterproof, and cementitious waterproof coatings, as well as waterproof materials; HDPE drainage boards; metal roofs; and waterproof systems for construction purposes. It also provides waterproof coatings, ceramic adhesive, tile grouts, water resistance putties, and other auxiliary materials and solutions for household purposes, as well as repair solutions. The company also exports its products to Singapore, Malaysia, Australia, Philippines, the Americas, etc. Keshun Waterproof Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is based in Foshan, China.
